/usr/bin/c++ -pedantic -Wno-long-long -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wcast-qual -Wformat -Wwrite-strings -Wconversion  -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/pinocchio-test-cpp-value.dir/value.cpp.o" -o pinocchio-test-cpp-value  ../src/libpinocchio_default.a ../src/libpinocchio_parsers.a /sy_workspace/INEXUS/controller_source/3rd_build/install/aarch64/boost/lib/libboost_filesystem.a ../src/libpinocchio_collision.a ../src/libpinocchio_default.a /sy_workspace/INEXUS/controller_source/3rd_build/install/aarch64/coal/lib/libcoal.a /sy_workspace/INEXUS/controller_source/3rd_build/install/aarch64/boost/lib/libboost_filesystem.a /sy_workspace/INEXUS/controller_source/3rd_build/install/aarch64/boost/lib/libboost_serialization.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libassimp.so.5.3.0 -lpugixml /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/liboctomap.so.1.9.7 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/liboctomath.so.1.9.7 /sy_workspace/INEXUS/controller_source/3rd_build/install/aarch64/urdfdom/lib/liburdfdom_sensor.a /sy_workspace/INEXUS/controller_source/3rd_build/install/aarch64/urdfdom/lib/liburdfdom_model.a /sy_workspace/INEXUS/controller_source/3rd_build/install/aarch64/urdfdom/lib/liburdfdom_world.a /sy_workspace/INEXUS/controller_source/3rd_build/install/aarch64/console_bridge/lib/libconsole_bridge.a /sy_workspace/INEXUS/controller_source/3rd_build/install/aarch64/tinyxml2/lib/libtinyxml2.a
